actors.name: shore reaver
actors.intent: charges in a straight line behind a levelled harpoon
actors.weakness: all that momentum is easy to sidestep on ice or bone-cobbles
actors.counter: stepping aside on slick terrain, or owing them a bigger debt than the one they came to collect
actors.want: oil, plunder, and a story worth telling in the hall

actors.name: whalehold debt-caller
actors.intent: calls a crew of witnesses to collect a carved debt in public
actors.weakness: needs the hall's witnesses to make the claim stick
actors.counter: settling or transferring the debt, or out-telling them in front of the same witnesses
actors.want: the debt paid, publicly, so the carving can be closed

actors.name: pack-ice bear
actors.intent: lumbers in to maul anything between it and the fish-racks
actors.weakness: overheats fast; will not follow far from the ice
actors.counter: leading it away from the cold, fire, or simply giving it the fish it came for
actors.want: the seal-fat and fish drying on the quay
